creator: mainland@apeiron.net
text:
On Wed, Apr 25, 2007 at 07:42:13AM +0000, Martin Wilke wrote:
> Synopsis: New port: devel/lhs2tex A preprocessor to generate LaTeX code from literate Haskell sour
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: miwi
> State-Changed-When: Wed Apr 25 07:42:12 UTC 2007
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Ask for maintainer fix.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=112096

This should be more acceptable.

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	lhs2tex
#	lhs2tex/pkg-descr
#	lhs2tex/distinfo
#	lhs2tex/Makefile
#	lhs2tex/pkg-plist
#	lhs2tex/files
#	lhs2tex/files/patch-configure
#	lhs2tex/files/patch-Makefile
#
echo c - lhs2tex
mkdir -p lhs2tex > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - lhs2tex/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >lhs2tex/pkg-descr << 'END-of-lhs2tex/pkg-descr'
Xlhs2TeX is a preprocessor to generate LaTeX code from literate Haskell
Xsources. It is released under the GPL.
X
XWWW: http://www.informatik.uni-bonn.de/~loeh/lhs2tex/
END-of-lhs2tex/pkg-descr
echo x - lhs2tex/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >lhs2tex/distinfo << 'END-of-lhs2tex/distinfo'
XMD5 (lhs2tex-1.12.tar.bz2) = 1bc982e96f19201aaf1c39c1d4b5e358
XSHA256 (lhs2tex-1.12.tar.bz2) = af3440b8d5dda73ad43660fa496f5e1c04a3d3105961847963d0105c69a03447
XSIZE (lhs2tex-1.12.tar.bz2) = 582250
END-of-lhs2tex/distinfo
echo x - lhs2tex/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >lhs2tex/Makefile << 'END-of-lhs2tex/Makefile'
X# ex:ts=8
X# Ports collection makefile for:	lhs2TeX
X# Date created:			April 24, 2007
X# Whom:				mainland@apeiron.net
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	lhs2tex
XPORTVERSION=	1.12
XCATEGORIES=	devel haskell
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.informatik.uni-bonn.de/~loeh/${PORTNAME}/
X
XMAINTAINER=	mainland@apeiron.net
XCOMMENT=	A preprocessor to generate LaTeX code from literate Haskell sources
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	ghc:${PORTSDIR}/lang/ghc \
X		mktexlsr:${PORTSDIR}/print/teTeX-base
X
XUSE_BZIP2=	yes
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XHAS_CONFIGURE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS=	--prefix=${PREFIX} \
X		--datadir=${DATADIR} \
X		--docdir=${DOCSDIR} \
X		--mandir=${MANPREFIX}/man
X
X.if defined(NOPORTDOCS)
XINSTALL_TARGET=install
X.else
XINSTALL_TARGET=install install-doc
X.endif
X
XMAN1=lhs2TeX.1
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-lhs2tex/Makefile
echo x - lhs2tex/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >lhs2tex/pkg-plist << 'END-of-lhs2tex/pkg-plist'
Xbin/lhs2TeX
Xshare/texmf-local/tex/latex/polytable/lazylist.sty
Xshare/texmf-local/tex/latex/polytable/polytable.sty
X@dirrm share/texmf-local/tex/latex/polytable
X%%DATADIR%%/lhs2tex/colorcode.fmt
X%%DATADIR%%/lhs2tex/forall.fmt
X%%DATADIR%%/lhs2tex/greek.fmt
X%%DATADIR%%/lhs2tex/jfpcompat.fmt
X%%DATADIR%%/lhs2tex/lhs2TeX.fmt
X%%DATADIR%%/lhs2tex/lhs2TeX.sty
X%%DATADIR%%/lhs2tex/polycode.fmt
X%%DATADIR%%/lhs2tex/spacing.fmt
X@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/lhs2tex
X@dirrm %%DATADIR%%
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/Guide2.pdf
X%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
X@exec %D/bin/mktexlsr
X@unexec %D/bin/mktexlsr
END-of-lhs2tex/pkg-plist
echo c - lhs2tex/files
mkdir -p lhs2tex/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - lhs2tex/files/patch-configure
sed 's/^X//' >lhs2tex/files/patch-configure << 'END-of-lhs2tex/files/patch-configure'
X--- ./configure.orig	Wed Apr 25 22:41:37 2007
X+++ ./configure	Wed Apr 25 22:41:55 2007
X@@ -2726,7 +2726,7 @@
X 
X 
X # docdir and expansion
X-docdir="$datadir/doc/$PACKAGE_TARNAME-$PACKAGE_VERSION"
X+#docdir="$datadir/doc/$PACKAGE_TARNAME-$PACKAGE_VERSION"
X 
X 
X # lhs2TeX binary path relative to docdir
END-of-lhs2tex/files/patch-configure
echo x - lhs2tex/files/patch-Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >lhs2tex/files/patch-Makefile << 'END-of-lhs2tex/files/patch-Makefile'
X--- ./Makefile.orig	Wed Apr 25 22:23:20 2007
X+++ ./Makefile	Wed Apr 25 22:24:00 2007
X@@ -135,14 +135,12 @@
X print : Lhs2TeX.dvi
X 	$(DVIPS) -D600 -f Lhs2TeX.dvi | lpr -Pa -Zl
X 
X-install : bin doc
X+install : bin
X 	$(MKINSTDIR) $(DESTDIR)$(bindir)
X 	$(INSTALL) -m 755 lhs2TeX $(DESTDIR)$(bindir)
X 	$(MKINSTDIR) $(DESTDIR)$(stydir)
X 	$(INSTALL) -m 644 lhs2TeX.sty lhs2TeX.fmt $(DESTDIR)$(stydir)
X 	$(INSTALL) -m 644 Library/*.fmt $(DESTDIR)$(stydir)
X-	$(MKINSTDIR) $(DESTDIR)$(docdir)
X-	$(INSTALL) -m 644 doc/Guide2.pdf $(DESTDIR)$(docdir)
X 	$(MKINSTDIR) $(DESTDIR)$(mandir)/man1
X 	$(INSTALL) -m 644 lhs2TeX.1 $(DESTDIR)$(mandir)/man1
X ifeq ($(INSTALL_POLYTABLE),yes)
X@@ -157,6 +155,10 @@
X else
X 	echo "Please update the TeX filename database."
X endif
X+
X+install-doc : doc
X+	$(MKINSTDIR) $(DESTDIR)$(docdir)
X+	$(INSTALL) -m 644 doc/Guide2.pdf $(DESTDIR)$(docdir)
X 
X srcdist : INSTALL doc
X 	if test -d $(DISTDIR); then $(RM) -rf $(DISTDIR); fi
END-of-lhs2tex/files/patch-Makefile
exit
